message:
fix: nuke preserves remote branches + enable GatesParallel (gt-v5ku, gt-8b2i)

Polecat nuke no longer deletes remote branches. The refinery owns remote
branch cleanup after successful merge. This eliminates the race where nuke
deletes the branch before the refinery merges it — the exact scenario that
lost the batch-then-bisect merge queue work (gt-i2vm).

Also enables GatesParallel=true by default so typecheck, lint, build, and
test run concurrently in the merge queue (~2x gate speedup).

Co-Authored-By: slit <steve.yegge@gmail.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -134,6 +134,7 @@ func DefaultMergeQueueConfig() *MergeQueueConfig {
 		RunTests:                true,
 		TestCommand:             "",
 		DeleteMergedBranches:    true,
+		GatesParallel:           true, // gt-8b2i: run gates concurrently (~2x speedup)
 		RetryFlakyTests:         1,
 		PollInterval:            30 * time.Second,
 		MaxConcurrent:           1,
